verdicts.reasoning: Source confirms function_keyspace/function_name; mask_keyspace/mask_function do not exist.
mask_outer keeps the middle and masks the ends; the demo's intent is inverted.
No ALL TABLES IN KEYSPACE resource; statement is a syntax error.
ADD/DROP IDENTITY documented; LIST IDENTITIES not found — treat as defect until verified.
Every version fact matches the release notes verbatim — no defect.
sstable* tools are not under /opt/hcd/bin; wrappers would fail.
Overlay merge keeps env + data volume and adds the certs mount; no hazard.
Anonymous healthcheck cannot pass under PasswordAuthenticator; nodes 2-6 never start.
RF=1 system_auth is the classic multi-DC auth fragility; real but mitigable post-boot.
CREATE ROLE requires CassandraRoleManager, absent on the open profile.
Lab manual contradicts the build; reader stages the wrong tarball.
Duplicate step number and a loop construct that does not exist in the script.
The riskiest new code (security infra) shipped untested.
No CRITICAL/HIGH shell defect; the new code paths are sound.

missed_strengths.point: The require_secure_profile gate correctly returns early in dry-run/score so the scorecard stays 94/94 honest.
Combined template+fragment was engineered with base auth keys commented, so the append introduces zero duplicate keys.
